message:
test(core): property-based tests for cass module (24 tests)

Covers parse_cass_timestamp_ms parsing invariants (epoch seconds,
epoch milliseconds, RFC3339, whitespace trimming, rejection of
empty/invalid), serde roundtrips for CassSession/CassSessionSummary/
CassMessage/CassSearchResult/CassSearchHit, CassAgent display
properties, and CassSessionSummary::from_session aggregation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
